Focusable Element Inside aria-hidden Test

These widgets have aria-hidden="true" on a container that still has visible, focusable children (buttons and links). This hides the content from assistive technology while leaving it keyboard-accessible — a contradiction.

This section is aria-hidden but contains a focusable button:

Another aria-hidden container with a link:

This link is tabbable but invisible to screen readers
